web3.title: Web3 Wallets (MetaMask, Trust)
web3.description: Just copy your Public Address (starts with 0x...). Paste it into the address field. Never enter your recovery phrase or private keys.

exchanges.title: Centralized Exchanges
exchanges.description: Go to your Exchange settings and find API Management. Generate an API Key and API Secret.
exchanges.critical: CRITICAL: Always set permissions to "Read-only". Disable Withdrawals and Trading for security.

okx.title: OKX Special Requirements
okx.description: Unlike other exchanges, OKX requires a Passphrase. This is a password you create specifically for the API key. You must provide all three: Key, Secret, and Passphrase.

analytics.title: Analytics & Balance
analytics.description: Once connected, your dashboard will automatically aggregate all tokens and calculate your Total Net Worth in real-time.

notice.title: Web3 Simulation Active
notice.undertitle: Currently, MetaMask and Trust Wallet connections use simulated datasets to manage commercial API costs.
notice.note: Note: The underlying source code includes a production-ready implementation for Moralis and Etherscan V2. Check the repository for API logic.

wallets.title: Connected Sources
wallets.no_wallets_text: Connect your first source to comfortable track your assets.

web3.title: Web3 Wallets
web3.description: Copy your Public Address (0x...). We never ask for private keys.

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.description: Provide your API Key and Secret.

okx.title: OKX Passphrase
okx.description: OKX requires your custom API Passphrase for authentification
